dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9528 IH: People Over Poison Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Pingree (for herself and Mr. Massie) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act to protect tort claims under State law related to labeling or packaging of pesticides or devices, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the People Over Poison Act.

section.header: Protecting tort claims under State law related to labeling or packaging of pesticides or devices
section.text: Section 24(b) of the Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act (7 U.S.C. 136v(b)) is amended by adding at the end the following: The previous sentence shall not be construed to prohibit or otherwise limit a claim related to the labeling or packaging of pesticides or devices under the tort law of any State..
